saints.name: Venerable Anthony of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Anthony, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Venerable Theodosius of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theodosius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Martyr Mamas of Caesarea in Cappadocia

troparion.text: Divine offshoot of the Martyrs,  /  you followed their steps with longing,  / and while proclaiming the Savior's Name, you were marvelous in the contest,  /  O wise and glorious Mámas; /  entreat Christ God to grant us great mercy.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Today the Virgin...”)
With the staff given to you by God, O Saint,  / shepherd your people in life-giving pastures, /  and crush unseen and fierce enemies beneath the feet of those who praise you; /  for all those who are in danger have you as a fervent intercessor, O Mámas.

saints.name: Martyrs Theodotus and Rufina of Caesarea, in Cappadocia

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs Theodotus and Rufina, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

saints.name: Saint John the Faster, Patriarch of Constantinople

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father John, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: You became like your namesake, the Forerunner, O John, / for you were radiant with fasting and purity; / and Christ has revealed you / as a worthy shepherd of his flock: / Now pray for those who honor your holy memory!

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

saints.name: Icon of the Mother of God of Kaluga

troparion.text: O invincible defender of the land of Kaluga from foreign enemies,  /  and merciful deliverer from deadly wounds;  /  rescue your servants from all misfortunes and sicknesses,  /  who turn to your wonderworking Icon with faith and love,   /  and save our souls.

kontakion.text: We have neither prayerful hymns, nor words to praise you worthily, /   O Mother of Christ our God, /   for the appearance of your wonderworking Icon in the land of Kaluga. /   We can only cry out to you: /   “Do not withhold your mercy from us,  /  but pour it forth upon all who turn to your Icon, which bestows healing.”
